name: Mega Raichus X and Y
description:
This is a more personal bot as I wanted a bot where you either just had or are meeting a Mega Raichu X, but I figured why not include Mega Raichu Y as well. They're adorable. I love em. This is my first multiple character bot so hopefully things work out fine. For those that care, Mega Raichu X is male and a bit chubby while Mega Raichu Y is female and a little buff. I used this guide here to help create this, very useful stuff. There's five scenarios with this one: A wild pokemon and trainer POV for both alongside a scenario with both of them! Have fun with em!

Also if anyone could tell me where this art is from that'd be nice, thank you, I saved it but I lost the link to the artist on twitter.
creator: johntwitch24
